targets.candidate_formalization: forall x : Circle.S0.Sign, Circle.S0.antipode x != x
targets.guardrail: Do not identify S0 with C_1.
targets.next_action: Promoted to S0-T0003 and Lean-proved as Circle.S0.antipode_ne.
targets.target_statement: For every S0 point x, antipode x is distinct from x.
targets.title: S0 antipode has no fixed point

targets.candidate_formalization: Circle.S0.antipode Circle.S0.Sign.neg = Circle.S0.Sign.pos and Circle.S0.antipode Circle.S0.Sign.pos = Circle.S0.Sign.neg
targets.guardrail: Keep this as finite opposition, not a cyclic rotation claim.
targets.next_action: Promoted to S0-T0004 and Lean-proved as Circle.S0.antipode_swaps.
targets.target_statement: The S0 antipode sends each named sign to the other sign.
targets.title: S0 antipode swaps the two named signs

targets.candidate_formalization: n != 0 -> (Circle.period n k = n iff Nat.gcd n k = 1)
targets.guardrail: Do not restrict the result to prime n; prime full-coil is only the common corollary.
targets.next_action: Promoted to CC-T0054 and Lean-proved as Circle.fullCoil_iff_coprime.
targets.target_statement: On a positive finite circle, stride k is a full coil exactly when gcd(n,k)=1.
targets.title: Full coil iff coprime

targets.candidate_formalization: n != 0 -> sameOrbit n k x y iff Nat.gcd n k divides representative_difference x y
targets.guardrail: Avoid ad hoc integer representatives that are not tied to ZMod equality.
targets.next_action: Use CC-T0055 as the quotient-level sameOrbit API, then prove the representative theorem with Nat.ModEq modulo Nat.gcd(n,k).
targets.target_statement: Two nodes lie in the same stride-k orbit exactly when their representatives differ by a multiple of gcd(n,k).
targets.title: Orbit membership by gcd congruence

targets.candidate_formalization: Nat.Coprime n a -> Function.Bijective (fun x => Circle.rot n b (Circle.scale n a x)) plus a composition normal form
targets.guardrail: Do not claim all endomorphisms are affine unless the classification is separately proved.
targets.next_action: First prove the forward bijection and composition lemmas; leave classification for later.
targets.target_statement: Every map built as a rotation after coprime scaling is a finite-circle bijection, and composition follows affine modular arithmetic.
targets.title: Affine circle automorphism normal form

targets.candidate_formalization: suspendedCircleAntipode n (longitudeRotation n stride p) = longitudeRotation n (-stride) (suspendedCircleAntipode n p)
targets.guardrail: Do not assign independent longitude coordinates to poles.
targets.next_action: Confirm signed or modular stride API for S2 longitude rotation.
targets.target_statement: On equator coordinates, rotating longitude and then taking the antipode agrees with taking the antipode and rotating by the opposite stride.
targets.title: Longitude rotation commutes with suspended-circle antipode

targets.candidate_formalization: For each latitude ring, orbitClassCount n k = Nat.gcd n k
targets.guardrail: Do not turn the whole sphere grid into a product of two circles.
targets.next_action: Package the inherited S1 orbit theorem as an S2 latitude theorem.
targets.target_statement: Each non-pole latitude ring decomposes under a stride into gcd(n,k) finite cycles.
targets.title: Latitude-ring orbit decomposition inherits S1 orbit count

targets.candidate_formalization: one_mul, mul_one, and inverse equations for Circle.S3.UnitQuaternion
targets.guardrail: Keep noncommutativity explicit.
targets.next_action: Expose a multiplication API on UnitQuaternion after the current closure theorem.
targets.target_statement: Unit quaternions have an identity element and conjugate inverse under multiplication.
targets.title: Unit quaternion identity and inverse laws

targets.candidate_formalization: Package S3H-T0004 and S3H-T0005 into a right-action interface for normalized Hopf pairs.
targets.guardrail: Do not claim S3 is globally S2 x S1.
targets.next_action: Define a finite action record or theorem bundle without claiming global product structure.
targets.target_statement: Identity phase fixes Hopf pairs and phase composition agrees with complex multiplication.
targets.title: Hopf phase action is a right action

targets.candidate_formalization: Setoid UnitQuaternion generated by q and -q
targets.guardrail: Do not claim a complete SO(3) formalization without quotient topology and rotation action proofs.
targets.next_action: Define the quotient relation before claiming SO(3) coverage.
targets.target_statement: The relation q ~ -q is reflexive, symmetric, and transitive on unit quaternions.
targets.title: Spin sign quotient equivalence relation

targets.candidate_formalization: eulerCharacteristic (iterate suspensionCounts m counts) = if m is even then chi counts else 2 - chi counts
targets.guardrail: Keep this finite-cell-count only, not a smooth classification theorem.
targets.next_action: Generalize the proved S4/S5/S6 finite calculation to an iteration theorem.
targets.target_statement: Iterated finite suspensions alternate Euler characteristic according to suspension parity.
targets.title: General iterated suspension Euler parity

targets.candidate_formalization: A manifest/paper theorem boundary rather than a Lean mathematical theorem.
targets.guardrail: Do not imply the project settles the S6 complex-structure problem.
targets.next_action: Add an explicit warning card or paper lemma tying S6-W0001 to the paper status.
targets.target_statement: The current S6 finite model proves only cell-count and Euler facts, not complex-structure claims.
targets.title: S6 warning theorem boundary

targets.candidate_formalization: quaternionicPhaseRotate (p * q) = quaternionicPhaseRotate q after quaternionicPhaseRotate p, plus base invariance
targets.guardrail: Do not claim full fibration topology.
targets.next_action: Define the right-phase action API around existing S7QH-T0001 and S7QH-T0002.
targets.target_statement: Right multiplication by unit quaternion phases composes according to quaternion multiplication and preserves the quaternionic Hopf base point.
targets.title: Quaternionic Hopf right phase action composition

targets.candidate_formalization: forall o, normSq o = 1 -> (conj o) * o = 1 and o * (conj o) = 1
targets.guardrail: Do not introduce a group API for unit octonions.
targets.next_action: Prove only bracket-explicit identities already supported by the coordinate model.
targets.target_statement: For a norm-one octonion, conjugation gives left and right inverse equations with explicit bracketing.
targets.title: Unit octonion inverse equations with bracketing

targets.candidate_formalization: octonionicHopfMap (x*u, y*u) = octonionicHopfMap (x,y) under norm-one and bracketed assumptions
targets.guardrail: Do not claim full octonionic Hopf fibration or quotient topology.
targets.next_action: Keep as planned until the octonionic bracketing and inverse lemmas are proved.
targets.target_statement: Shared right unit-octonion phase should preserve the bounded octonionic Hopf landing coordinates where the nonassociative formula is explicitly bracketed.
targets.title: Octonionic Hopf phase-invariance target

targets.candidate_formalization: Validity predicate over generated theorem metadata and proof glyph fields.
targets.guardrail: A glyph is a proof interface, not a proof substitute.
targets.next_action: Define a finite metadata model before connecting to generated JSON.
targets.target_statement: A proof-carrying glyph certificate is valid only if its theorem id resolves to a manifest entry and its Lean name matches generated theorem data.
targets.title: Glyph certificate resolves theorem manifest entry

targets.candidate_formalization: Transition maps over a finite base with cocycle-like compatibility on triple overlaps.
targets.guardrail: Do not treat twisted bundles as global products.
targets.next_action: Choose finite overlap data before registering as a theorem id.
targets.target_statement: Future nontrivial bundle transition functions must preserve base coordinates and compose on overlaps.
targets.title: Bundle transition sanity target

targets.candidate_formalization: Executable benchmark protocol plus bounded phase-coordinate theorem links.
targets.guardrail: Benchmark results are not Lean proofs.
targets.next_action: Add deterministic synthetic generators and benchmark fixtures.
targets.target_statement: Coil signatures should be compared against standard periodogram/autocorrelation baselines on synthetic periodic data before usefulness claims.
targets.title: Coil signatures versus ordinary period baselines

targets.candidate_formalization: MLX benchmark harness plus finite index theorems already present in AI manifests.
targets.guardrail: No claim that circles improve all AI.
targets.next_action: Create a tiny deterministic MLX-compatible benchmark before claiming speed or quality.
targets.target_statement: Phase-channel, cyclic-memory, and adapter-block AI ideas should be benchmarked on Mac/MLX against standard baselines before making model-quality claims.
targets.title: MLX phase-channel benchmark target

targets.candidate_formalization: Extend benchmark_coil_layout.py with reproducible fixtures and record results without overclaiming.
targets.guardrail: Performance claims require benchmarks.
targets.next_action: Add benchmark parameter grid and expected-output checks.
targets.target_statement: Circular/stride layout claims should be benchmarked against dense, direct, FFT, and layout baselines.
targets.title: Coil layout memory-locality benchmark
